name: running-coach
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the running-coach agent. Install with `/plugin marketplace add David-Eques/running-coach` then `/plugin install running-coach@running-coach`.

plugins.name: running-coach
plugins.description: Adaptive weekly run planner backed by a Cloudflare Worker MCP that wraps Strava. Reads agent/plan.md, calls the running-coach MCP for load math, and emits next week's workouts as Google Calendar events.
